$comment: Registry of pinned/vendored AI tooling. bin/ai-tools-check compares each entry against upstream (cached, background); bin/ai-tools-update performs the bump plus its bookkeeping. Adding a tracked tool should be one entry here, not new code.

items.name: caveman
items.note: Bumping = git -C vendor/caveman checkout <tag> + update pinned_sha in MANIFEST.yml. Re-check the two local deltas listed there survive.

items.name: humanizer
items.note: Vendored verbatim, MIT. Bump = re-fetch SKILL.md, refresh skillVersion + vendoredSha256.

items.name: @playwright/mcp
items.note: COUPLED: this version resolves a playwright-core expecting a specific chromium rev, and nixpkgs' playwright-driver must ship that same rev. Bump both together or screenshots break.

items.name: voice-corpus
items.note: Maintained by the voice-profile timer; staleness here means the timer stopped firing.
